beer.beer_description:
St Edward: Montepulciano was made by blending barrel aged amber mixed culture fermentation ale with 489kg of Montepulciano from Grove Estate in Young, NSW. After a four month maceration and refermentation of fruit and beer, it was bottled and allowed to naturally carbonate and mature for 9 months before release.

Tasting notes: The lushest colour and foam I’ve seen on a beer in a very long time. Sweet malt and a rich, ripe cherry character on the nose, interwoven with a vanillin oak. The palate is full and rich, with a note of smokiness that adds depth and complexity, making it very moreish.

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 65 distinct venues!

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 285 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 58!

That's 40 different beers with the style of Brett Beer, American Wild Ale, IPA - Brett or Wild Ale - Other. Try 5 more for Level 9!

items.badge_description: Right about now you’re feeling your face tighten and your taste buds explode. The full pucker is quickly setting in and you can’t get enough. This is the wonder of the sour. That's 105 different Sour Beers. Try 5 more for Level 22.

items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 210 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 43! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 390 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 79!
